analysis.name: QuickBooks
analysis.tagline: Accounting software built for your small business
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one accounting platform for small businesses covering invoicing, expenses, payroll, and taxes with deep accountant ecosystem support.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small business owners (1–25 employees) who need double-entry accounting, payroll, and tax compliance without a full-time accountant

features.name: invoicing
features.description: Create, send, and track professional invoices with payment links
features.evidence_quote: Create and send invoices, then get paid faster with online payment options

features.name: recurring invoices
features.description: Automatically schedule and send invoices on a recurring basis
features.evidence_quote: Set up recurring invoices to automatically bill customers on a schedule

features.name: batch invoicing
features.description: Create and send multiple invoices simultaneously to different customers
features.evidence_quote: Batch invoices and expenses

features.name: estimates and quotes
features.description: Generate estimates that can be converted directly to invoices
features.evidence_quote: Turn estimates into invoices with one click

features.name: expense tracking
features.description: Track, categorize, and manage business expenses automatically
features.evidence_quote: Automatically track expenses and sort them into tax categories

features.name: receipt capture
features.description: Photograph receipts via mobile app to auto-extract and record expense data
features.evidence_quote: Snap a photo of your receipt and we'll match it to a transaction

features.name: bank feed sync
features.description: Automatically import and categorize transactions from connected bank and credit card accounts
features.evidence_quote: Connect your bank and credit card accounts to automatically import transactions

features.name: bank reconciliation
features.description: Match imported bank transactions to recorded books entries to reconcile accounts
features.evidence_quote: Reconcile your accounts to make sure your books match your bank statements

features.name: accounts receivable
features.description: Track money owed by customers with aging reports and payment status
features.evidence_quote: See who owes you money and how long invoices have been outstanding

features.name: accounts payable
features.description: Track bills owed to vendors with due dates and payment scheduling
features.evidence_quote: Manage and pay bills, including partial payments

features.name: profit and loss reporting
features.description: Standard P&L statement with income and expense breakdown by period
features.evidence_quote: See your profit and loss at a glance with auto-generated reports

features.name: balance sheet
features.description: Real-time balance sheet showing assets, liabilities, and equity
features.evidence_quote: Run a balance sheet to see your company's financial position

features.name: cash flow statement
features.description: Track cash inflows and outflows across operating, investing, and financing activities
features.evidence_quote: Statement of cash flows shows where your money came from and where it went

features.name: cash flow forecasting
features.description: Project future cash positions based on scheduled invoices and bills
features.evidence_quote: See what your cash flow will look like in the next 30, 60, or 90 days

features.name: sales tax tracking
features.description: Automatically calculate, collect, and report sales tax by jurisdiction
features.evidence_quote: Automatically track sales tax so you know what you owe

features.name: 1099 contractor management
features.description: Track contractor payments and generate/file 1099 forms at year-end
features.evidence_quote: Track payments to contractors and prepare 1099s at tax time

features.name: payroll
features.description: Run full-service payroll with tax filing and direct deposit (add-on)
features.evidence_quote: Add QuickBooks Payroll to run payroll and pay employees directly from QuickBooks

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Track employee and contractor hours, billable time by project or customer
features.evidence_quote: Track time and add billable hours directly to invoices

features.name: mileage tracking
features.description: Automatic GPS-based mileage logging via mobile app for tax deduction purposes
features.evidence_quote: Automatically track mileage on your phone using GPS

features.name: inventory management
features.description: Track product quantities, cost of goods, and reorder points
features.evidence_quote: Track inventory and get low stock alerts

features.name: purchase orders
features.description: Create and send POs to vendors, then receive items against them
features.evidence_quote: Create purchase orders and manage vendor bills

features.name: project profitability tracking
features.description: Assign income and expenses to projects to see per-project profit/loss
features.evidence_quote: Track project profitability with project income and expense tracking

features.name: job costing
features.description: Allocate costs to specific jobs or projects to measure profitability
features.evidence_quote: See the cost of each job and compare estimated vs actual amounts

features.name: class tracking
features.description: Tag transactions by business segment, department, or location for segmented reporting
features.evidence_quote: Track by class or location for more detailed reporting

features.name: location tracking
features.description: Segment financial data by physical location or business unit
features.evidence_quote: Separate reporting by location

features.name: budgeting
features.description: Create annual budgets by account, class, or location and compare to actuals
features.evidence_quote: Set a budget, then run reports to compare budget vs actuals

features.name: multi-currency support
features.description: Invoice and record transactions in foreign currencies with exchange rate handling
features.evidence_quote: Work in multiple currencies and track exchange rates

features.name: custom user roles and permissions
features.description: Define granular access controls for employees and accountants
features.evidence_quote: Customize access by role with up to 3 accountant users

features.name: accountant access
features.description: Invite external accountants or bookkeepers with dedicated access role
features.evidence_quote: Invite your accountant to collaborate in QuickBooks

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS and Android apps for invoicing, expense capture, and reporting on the go
features.evidence_quote: Manage your business on the go with the QuickBooks mobile app

features.name: online payment acceptance
features.description: Accept credit cards, ACH, and Apple Pay directly through invoice payment links
features.evidence_quote: Get paid faster — accept credit cards and bank transfers right in your invoice

features.name: bitcoin payments
features.description: Accept Bitcoin as payment (noted in HN as an integration capability)
features.evidence_quote: QuickBooks Bitcoin Payments

features.name: smart reporting (fathom-powered)
features.description: Advanced business analytics and custom KPI reporting via Fathom integration
features.evidence_quote: Smart reporting powered by Fathom with customizable KPI tracking

features.name: workflow automation
features.description: Automate recurring tasks like payment reminders, approvals, and data entry
features.evidence_quote: Automate workflows to save time on repetitive tasks

features.name: custom chart of accounts
features.description: Build and customize the full chart of accounts to match business structure
features.evidence_quote: Add, edit, and organize your chart of accounts

features.name: journal entries
features.description: Manual double-entry journal entry creation for adjustments and corrections
features.evidence_quote: Create journal entries to make adjustments to your books

features.name: fixed asset management
features.description: Track fixed assets and calculate depreciation schedules
features.evidence_quote: Track fixed assets and manage depreciation

features.name: data backup and restore
features.description: Automatic cloud backups with point-in-time restore capability
features.evidence_quote: Automatic data backup and restore

features.name: dedicated account manager
features.description: Named Intuit support contact for onboarding and ongoing assistance
features.evidence_quote: Get a dedicated Customer Success Manager

features.name: on-demand training
features.description: Access to QuickBooks training content and online courses
features.evidence_quote: On-demand QuickBooks training for you and your team

features.name: app marketplace / integrations
features.description: Connect 750+ third-party apps via the QuickBooks App Store
features.evidence_quote: Connect the apps you already use with 750+ integrations in the QuickBooks App Store

features.name: tax deduction identification
features.description: Automatically identifies potential business tax deductions from categorized expenses
features.evidence_quote: We'll identify tax deductions to help lower your tax bill

features.name: custom reporting
features.description: Build and save custom financial reports beyond standard templates
features.evidence_quote: Customize reports to show the data you need, then save for later

features.name: bill pay
features.description: Pay vendor bills via ACH or check directly from QuickBooks
features.evidence_quote: Pay bills online and schedule payments

features.name: vendor management
features.description: Maintain vendor contact records, payment terms, and transaction history
features.evidence_quote: Store vendor information and see all transactions with each vendor

features.name: customer management (crm-lite)
features.description: Store customer contact info, notes, and full transaction history
features.evidence_quote: Keep track of customer information and see all invoices and payments

features.name: e-commerce sales import
features.description: Sync sales data from Shopify, Amazon, eBay, and WooCommerce storefronts
features.evidence_quote: Sync your Shopify sales, refunds, and fees automatically

features.name: audit log
features.description: Track all changes made to transactions and records with user attribution
features.evidence_quote: See a full audit trail of changes to your books

features.name: multi-user collaboration
features.description: Multiple team members can work simultaneously with role-based access
features.evidence_quote: Add up to 3 users (Essentials) or 5 users (Plus) to your account

features.name: desktop version (subscription)
features.description: Windows-based desktop application with local data option, now subscription-only
features.evidence_quote: QuickBooks Desktop moves to subscription model

features.name: self-employed / freelancer mode
features.description: Simplified version for sole proprietors tracking personal/business split and Schedule C
features.evidence_quote: Separate business and personal expenses and maximize Schedule C deductions

differentiators: Largest accountant/bookkeeper ecosystem — most CPAs know QuickBooks natively
Industry standard for SMB accounting in the US — tax prep software integrates by default
Integrated payroll, payments, and time tracking in a single vendor
Self-Employed tier specifically designed for Schedule C filers and freelancers

recent_ships.what: QuickBooks Desktop forced migration to subscription-only model, removing perpetual license option
recent_ships.source: QuickBooks Desktop moves to subscription model (HN thread)

praised: Deep accountant familiarity — nearly every CPA knows QBO so handoffs are seamless
Bank feed sync and automatic transaction categorization saves significant manual entry
Large app ecosystem means it connects to almost every tool a small business uses
Payroll + accounting in one place reduces reconciliation headaches
Mobile receipt capture and mileage tracking praised by sole proprietors
complaints: Frequent price increases frustrate long-term customers — 'they raise prices every year'
Move to subscription model for Desktop was controversial: 'QuickBooks Desktop moves to subscription model' (HN)
Multiple open-source alternatives gaining traction suggests significant user frustration with cost and complexity
Cloud hosting security concern — iNSYNQ ransomware attack exposed cloud-hosted QBO data risk
Customer support widely criticized as slow and hard to reach
UI complexity for non-accountants — steep learning curve relative to newer competitors
Bugs and glitches in bank feeds and reconciliation reported by power users
Data portability concerns — exporting data or switching away is difficult

tiers.name: Simple Start
tiers.yearly_discount_pct: ~50% off for first 3 months promotional, then full price
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 user, invoicing, expense tracking, basic reports, mileage, receipt capture

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3 users, adds bill pay, time tracking, multi-currency, recurring transactions

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 users, adds inventory, project tracking, class/location tracking, budgeting

tiers.name: Advanced
tiers.headline_inclusions: 25 users, adds batch invoicing, workflow automation, smart reporting, dedicated CSM, data restore

pricing.notes: Prices listed are post-promotional rack rates and change frequently. Intuit commonly runs 50% off for 3 months promotions. Payroll is a separate paid add-on (Core ~$45/mo + $6/employee, Premium ~$80/mo, Elite ~$125/mo). QuickBooks Self-Employed is a separate ~$15/mo product. QuickBooks Desktop (Pro, Premier, Enterprise) is a distinct product line with separate pricing. No true free tier exists; 30-day free trial available. Prices increase annually without notice to existing subscribers.
